personal.name: Ramya Sri
personal.title: AI Engineer
personal.tagline: I don't predict the future — I build the agents that do
personal.description: AI geek who speaks fluent Python and dreams in neural networks. Currently teaching machines to think, one multi-agent system at a time. When London's transport gets smarter, you'll know who to thank.

highlights: Engineered intelligent WhatsApp chatbot using n8n + multiple LLMs (Ollama, Qwen, Mistral, Gemini, DeepSeek) with memory retention
Designed multi-agent architecture handling customer queries, invoice generation, analytical reports — reducing response time by 70%
Built real-time IoT dashboards for Smart Water, Energy, and Light management using ThingsBoard

projects.title: OnTimeLondon AI
projects.subtitle: Multi-Agent Travel Intelligence System
projects.description: A groundbreaking 5-agent AI pipeline that's transforming how Londoners navigate the city. This system predicts transport delays in real-time and delivers personalized route recommendations to commuters across the entire TfL network.
projects.longDescription: Built to tackle London's complex transport challenges, OnTimeLondon AI combines cutting-edge machine learning with real-time data processing. The system ingests live TfL data, detects anomalies using Z-Score analysis, predicts delays with LSTM neural networks, optimizes routes using Dijkstra's algorithm, and personalizes recommendations through reinforcement learning — all orchestrated through a sophisticated n8n multi-agent workflow.
highlights: LSTM model trained on 47,774 TfL records achieving ~97% accuracy
Real-time Z-Score anomaly detection on live transport data
Dijkstra's algorithm optimizing routes across 471 stations & 1,154 connections
Epsilon-Greedy RL + Collaborative Filtering for smart personalization
5-agent n8n pipeline: Anomaly Detection → Delay Prediction → Route Optimization → Personalization → LLM Response Generation

projects.title: NexusEdu
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Personalized Learning Platform
projects.description: A hackathon-winning intelligent tutoring system that adapts to each student's learning style. Uses multi-agent n8n workflows to deliver personalized educational content, gamified quizzes, and adaptive assessments.
highlights: Multi-agent workflow for adaptive learning paths
LLM-powered content generation tailored by grade level
